mapper.select: select count(*) from members where email = #{email}
select count(*) from members where phone = #{phone}
select count(*) from members where nickname = #{nickname}
mapper.insert: insert into auth_codes ( member_id, target_type, target_value, purpose, code_hash, expires_at, attempt_count ) values ( #{memberId}, #{targetType}, #{targetValue}, #{purpose}, #{codeHash}, #{expiresAt}, #{attemptCount} )
mapper.select: select auth_code_id, code_hash, expires_at, verified_at, used_at, attempt_count, created_at from auth_codes where target_type = #{targetType} and target_value = #{targetValue} and purpose = #{purpose} and used_at is null order by created_at desc limit 1
mapper.update: update auth_codes set verified_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00'), attempt_count = 0 where auth_code_id = #{authCodeId}
mapper.select: select terms_id, terms_type, version, title, content, is_required, is_active, created_at from terms where is_active = 1 order by is_required desc, terms_id asc
select terms_id, terms_type, version, title, content, is_required, is_active, created_at from terms where is_active = 1 and is_required = 1 order by terms_id asc

select count(*) from auth_codes where target_type = 'EMAIL' and target_value = #{email} and purpose = 'SIGNUP' and verified_at is not null and used_at is null and verified_at >= date_sub(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00'), interval 10 minute)

select count(*) from auth_codes where target_type = 'PHONE' and target_value = #{phone} and purpose = 'SIGNUP' and verified_at is not null and used_at is null and verified_at >= date_sub(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00'), interval 10 minute)
mapper.insert: insert into members ( email, password_hash, name, nickname, phone, email_verified, phone_verified ) values ( #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{name}, #{nickname}, #{phone}, #{emailVerified}, #{phoneVerified} )

insert into member_terms_agreements ( member_id, terms_id, agreed, agreed_at ) values ( #{memberId}, #{termsId}, #{agreed}, case when #{agreed} = 1 then CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') else null end )
